message:
feat(playbook): add --repo flag to playbook add command

Adds support for --repo flag on both single-rule and batch add operations:

- cm playbook add "rule content" --repo
- cm playbook add --file rules.json --repo

When --repo is passed:
- Rules are stored in .cass/playbook.yaml (workspace-level playbook)
- scope is set to "workspace" instead of "global"
- The .cass/ directory is created if it doesn't exist

This mirrors the existing --repo support on cm playbook import.

Closes #19

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
